---
title: "3.3 - Parameters Grid Search"
output: html_document
---

# Cell 1: Setup and Data

```{r}
set.seed(9054)
library(R.ROSETTA)

selected_positions <- read.csv("data/clean/selected_positions.csv")

cat("Data:", nrow(selected_positions), "rows x", ncol(selected_positions), "cols\n")
cat("Classes:", paste(names(table(selected_positions$class)), table(selected_positions$class), sep="=", collapse=", "), "\n")
```

# ============================================================
# GRID SEARCH 1: Johnson BRT / BRTprec / Fraction (64 configs)
# ============================================================

# Cell 2: Build Super Grid

```{r}
fraction_vals    <- c(1, 0.98, 0.95, 0.9, 0.85, 0.8, 0.75, 0.7, 0.65, 0.6, 0.55, 0.5, 0.45, 0.4, 0.35, 0.3, 0.25, 0.2, 0.15, 0.1, 0.05)
brtprec_vals     <- c(1, 0.98, 0.95, 0.9, 0.85, 0.8, 0.75, 0.7, 0.65, 0.6, 0.55, 0.5, 0.45, 0.4, 0.35, 0.3, 0.25, 0.2, 0.15, 0.1, 0.05)
classifier_vals  <- c("StandardVoter", "ObjectTrackingVoter")
discern_vals     <- c("Full", "Object")

grid_brt_false <- expand.grid(
    BRT                   = FALSE,
    BRTprec               = 0,
    Fraction              = fraction_vals,
    classifier            = classifier_vals,
    reducerDiscernibility = discern_vals,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

grid_brt_true <- expand.grid(
    BRT                   = TRUE,
    BRTprec               = brtprec_vals,
    Fraction              = fraction_vals,
    classifier            = classifier_vals,
    reducerDiscernibility = discern_vals,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

super_grid <- rbind(grid_brt_false, grid_brt_true)
cat("Super grid configs:", nrow(super_grid), "\n")
```

# Cell 3: Run Grid 1

```{r}
# Cell 2: Run Super Grid

super_results <- data.frame(
    BRT                   = logical(),
    BRTprec               = numeric(),
    Fraction              = numeric(),
    classifier            = character(),
    reducerDiscernibility = character(),
    accuracyMean          = numeric(),
    nRules                = integer(),
    nSigRules             = integer(),
    nSuperSigRules        = integer(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (i in 1:nrow(super_grid)) {
    cfg <- super_grid[i, ]
    if (i %% 100 == 0 || i == 1 || i == nrow(super_grid)) {
        cat(sprintf("SuperGrid %d/%d — BRT=%s BRTprec=%.2f Fraction=%.2f cls=%s discern=%s\n",
                    i, nrow(super_grid), cfg$BRT, cfg$BRTprec, cfg$Fraction,
                    cfg$classifier, cfg$reducerDiscernibility))
    }

    jp <- list(
        Modulo      = TRUE,
        BRT         = cfg$BRT,
        BRTprec     = cfg$BRTprec,
        Precompute  = FALSE,
        Approximate = TRUE,
        Fraction    = cfg$Fraction
    )

    ros <- tryCatch(
        suppressWarnings(rosetta(selected_positions,
                reducer               = "Johnson",
                JohnsonParam          = jp,
                reducerDiscernibility = cfg$reducerDiscernibility,
                classifier            = cfg$classifier,
                roc                   = FALSE,
                discrete              = TRUE)),
        error = function(e) { cat("  ERROR:", e$message, "\n"); NULL }
    )

    if (is.null(ros)) next

    rec <- recalculateRules(selected_positions, ros$main, discrete = TRUE)
    sig       <- sum(rec$pValue < 0.05,  na.rm = TRUE)
    super_sig <- sum(rec$pValue < 0.001, na.rm = TRUE)

    super_results <- rbind(super_results, data.frame(
        BRT                   = cfg$BRT,
        BRTprec               = cfg$BRTprec,
        Fraction              = cfg$Fraction,
        classifier            = cfg$classifier,
        reducerDiscernibility = cfg$reducerDiscernibility,
        accuracyMean          = ros$quality$accuracyMean,
        nRules                = nrow(ros$main),
        nSigRules             = sig,
        nSuperSigRules        = super_sig,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
}

cat("\nSuper grid complete.\n")
```

# Cell 4: Grid 1 Results

```{r}
super_results <- super_results[order(-super_results$accuracyMean, na.last = TRUE), ]
rownames(super_results) <- NULL

cat("=== Super Grid: Top 15 by mean accuracy ===\n\n")
print(super_results[1:min(35, nrow(super_results)), ], row.names = FALSE)

# --- Marginal summaries ---
cat("\n=== Mean accuracy by classifier ===\n")
cls_summary <- aggregate(accuracyMean ~ classifier, data = super_results, FUN = mean)
cls_summary <- cls_summary[order(-cls_summary$accuracyMean), ]
print(cls_summary, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== Mean accuracy by reducerDiscernibility ===\n")
disc_summary <- aggregate(accuracyMean ~ reducerDiscernibility, data = super_results, FUN = mean)
disc_summary <- disc_summary[order(-disc_summary$accuracyMean), ]
print(disc_summary, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== Mean accuracy by JohnsonParam combo (Top 15) ===\n")
jp_summary <- aggregate(accuracyMean ~ BRT + BRTprec + Fraction, data = super_results, FUN = mean)
jp_summary <- jp_summary[order(-jp_summary$accuracyMean), ]
print(jp_summary[1:min(15, nrow(jp_summary)), ], row.names = FALSE)

# --- Best config ---
best <- super_results[1, ]
cat("\nBest config:\n")
cat("  BRT:", best$BRT, " BRTprec:", best$BRTprec, " Fraction:", best$Fraction, "\n")
cat("  classifier:", best$classifier, "\n")
cat("  reducerDiscernibility:", best$reducerDiscernibility, "\n")
cat("  Accuracy:", best$accuracyMean, " Rules:", best$nRules,
    "(", best$nSigRules, "sig /", best$nSuperSigRules, "super-sig)\n")

best_jp <- list(
    Modulo      = TRUE,
    BRT         = best$BRT,
    BRTprec     = best$BRTprec,
    Precompute  = FALSE,
    Approximate = TRUE,
    Fraction    = best$Fraction
)
best_classifier <- best$classifier
best_discern    <- best$reducerDiscernibility
```

# ============================================================
# GRID SEARCH 3: Rule Filtration (126 configs)
# ============================================================

# Cell 8: Build Grid 3

```{r}
# Support intervals to REMOVE (low-support rules only)
support_vals <- list(
  c(1,1),
  c(1,2),
  c(1,3),
  c(1,5),
  c(1,8),
  c(1,12),
  c(1,18),
  c(1,24),
  c(1,30),
  c(1,40),
  c(1,50),
  c(1,60),
  c(1,70),
  c(1,80),
  c(1,90),
  c(1,100),
  c(1,110)
)

# Accuracy — remove progressively stronger rules (very aggressive pruning)
accuracy_vals <- list(
  c(0,0.50),
  c(0,0.55),
  c(0,0.60),
  c(0,0.65),
  c(0,0.70),
  c(0,0.75),
  c(0,0.80),
  c(0,0.84),
  c(0,0.86),
  c(0,0.88),
  c(0,0.90),
  c(0,0.92),
  c(0,0.93),
  c(0,0.94),
  c(0,0.95),
  c(0,0.96),
  c(0,0.97),
  c(0,0.98),
  c(0,0.99)
)

# Coverage — remove rules covering increasingly larger fractions of class
coverage_vals <- list(
  c(0,0.01),
  c(0,0.02),
  c(0,0.03),
  c(0,0.05),
  c(0,0.08),
  c(0,0.10),
  c(0,0.15),
  c(0,0.20),
  c(0,0.25),
  c(0,0.30),
  c(0,0.35),
  c(0,0.40),
  c(0,0.45),
  c(0,0.50),
  c(0,0.55),
  c(0,0.60),
  c(0,0.70),
  c(0,0.80),
  c(0,0.90)
)

# No filtration baseline
grid3_no_filt <- data.frame(
  ruleFiltration = FALSE,
  supp_idx = 1,
  acc_idx  = 1,
  cov_idx  = 1,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

grid3_with_filt <- expand.grid(
  supp_idx = 1:17,
  acc_idx  = 1:19,
  cov_idx  = 1:19,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
grid3_with_filt$ruleFiltration <- TRUE

grid3 <- rbind(grid3_no_filt, grid3_with_filt)
cat("Grid 3 configs:", nrow(grid3), "\n")
```

# Cell 9: Run Grid 3

```{r}
results3 <- data.frame(
    ruleFiltration   = logical(),
    filtrSupport     = character(),
    filtrAccuracy    = character(),
    filtrCoverage    = character(),
    accuracyMean     = numeric(),
    nRules           = integer(),
    nSigRules        = integer(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (i in 1:nrow(grid3)) {

    cfg <- grid3[i, ]

    s_val <- support_vals[[cfg$supp_idx]]
    a_val <- accuracy_vals[[cfg$acc_idx]]
    c_val <- coverage_vals[[cfg$cov_idx]]

    if (i %% 150 == 0 || i == 1 || i == nrow(super_grid)) {
      cat(sprintf("Grid3 %d/%d — Filt=%s Supp=c(%s) Acc=c(%s) Cov=c(%s)\n",
                  i, nrow(grid3),
                  cfg$ruleFiltration,
                  paste(s_val, collapse=","),
                  paste(a_val, collapse=","),
                  paste(c_val, collapse=",")))
    }

    ros <- tryCatch(
        rosetta(
            selected_positions,
            reducer = "Johnson",
            JohnsonParam = best_jp,
            reducerDiscernibility = best2_discern,
            discrete = TRUE,
            classifier = best2_classifier,
            ruleFiltration = cfg$ruleFiltration,
            ruleFiltrSupport = s_val,
            ruleFiltrAccuracy = a_val,
            ruleFiltrCoverage = c_val,
            roc = FALSE
        ),
        error = function(e) {
            cat("  ERROR:", e$message, "\n")
            NULL
        }
    )

    if (is.null(ros)) next

    rec <- recalculateRules(selected_positions, ros$main, discrete = TRUE)

    if (is.null(rec)) next

    sig <- sum(rec$pValue < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)

    acc_mean <- NA_real_
    if (!is.null(ros$quality) && "accuracyMean" %in% names(ros$quality)) {
        acc_mean <- ros$quality$accuracyMean
    }

    results3 <- rbind(results3, data.frame(
        ruleFiltration = cfg$ruleFiltration,
        filtrSupport   = paste0("c(", paste(s_val, collapse=","), ")"),
        filtrAccuracy  = paste0("c(", paste(a_val, collapse=","), ")"),
        filtrCoverage  = paste0("c(", paste(c_val, collapse=","), ")"),
        accuracyMean   = acc_mean,
        nRules         = nrow(ros$main),
        nSigRules      = sig,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
}

cat("\nGrid 3 complete.\n")
```

# Cell 10: Grid 3 Results

```{r}
results3 <- results3[order(-results3$accuracyMean, na.last = TRUE), ]
rownames(results3) <- NULL

cat("=== Grid 3: Top by mean accuracy ===\n\n")
print(results3[1:min(25, nrow(results3)), ], row.names = FALSE)

best3 <- results3[1, ]
cat("\nBest Grid 3 config:\n")
cat("  ruleFiltration:", best3$ruleFiltration, "\n")
cat("  filtrSupport:", best3$filtrSupport, "\n")
cat("  filtrAccuracy:", best3$filtrAccuracy, "\n")
cat("  filtrCoverage:", best3$filtrCoverage, "\n")
cat("  Accuracy:", best3$accuracyMean, " Rules:", best3$nRules, "(", best3$nSigRules, "sig)\n")

best_filt       <- best3$ruleFiltration
best_filt_supp  <- eval(parse(text = best3$filtrSupport))
best_filt_acc   <- eval(parse(text = best3$filtrAccuracy))
best_filt_cov   <- eval(parse(text = best3$filtrCoverage))
```
# Cell 11: Show best config
```{r}
best_config <- list(
    jp = best_jp,
    classifier = best_classifier,
    reducerDiscernibility = best_discern,
    ruleFiltration = best_filt,
    ruleFiltrSupport = best_filt_supp,
    ruleFiltrAccuracy = best_filt_acc,
    ruleFiltrCoverage = best_filt_cov
)

cat("=== Best Config Summary ===\n\n")
cat("JohnsonParam:\n")
print(best_config$jp)
cat("Classifier:", best_config$classifier, "\n")
cat("Reducer Discernibility:", best_config$reducerDiscernibility, "\n")
cat("Rule Filtration:", best_config$ruleFiltration, "\n")
if (best_config$ruleFiltration) {
    cat("  Support filter: c(", paste(best_config$ruleFiltrSupport, collapse,"),\n", sep=""), ")\n")
    cat("  Accuracy filter: c(", paste(best_config$ruleFiltrAccuracy, collapse,"),\n", sep=""), ")\n")
    cat("  Coverage filter: c(", paste(best_config$ruleFiltrCoverage, collapse,"),\n", sep=""), ")\n")
}
```

# Cell 12: Genetic
```{r}
cat("=== Johnson vs Genetic on best config ===\n\n")

cat("Running Johnson...\n")
ros_johnson <- rosetta(selected_positions,
    reducer = "Johnson",
    JohnsonParam = best_config$jp,
    reducerDiscernibility = best_config$reducerDiscernibility,
    discrete = TRUE,
    classifier = best_config$classifier,
    ruleFiltration = best_config$ruleFiltration,
    ruleFiltrSupport = best_config$ruleFiltrSupport,
    ruleFiltrAccuracy = best_config$ruleFiltrAccuracy,
    ruleFiltrCoverage = best_config$ruleFiltrCoverage)

cat("Running Genetic...\n")
gp_simple <- list(
    Modulo      = best_config$jp$Modulo,
    BRT         = best_config$jp$BRT,
    BRTprec     = best_config$jp$BRTprec,
    Precompute  = best_config$jp$Precompute,
    Approximate = best_config$jp$Approximate,
    Fraction    = best_config$jp$Fraction,
    Algorithm   = "Simple"
)

ros_genetic_simple <- rosetta(selected_positions,
    reducer = "Genetic",
    GeneticParam = gp_simple,
    reducerDiscernibility = best_config$reducerDiscernibility,
    discrete = TRUE,
    classifier = best_config$classifier,
    ruleFiltration = best_config$ruleFiltration,
    ruleFiltrSupport = best_config$ruleFiltrSupport,
    ruleFiltrAccuracy = best_config$ruleFiltrAccuracy,
    ruleFiltrCoverage = best_config$ruleFiltrCoverage)

cat("\n--- Johnson ---\n")
print(ros_johnson$quality)
cat("Rules:", nrow(ros_johnson$main), "\n")

cat("\n--- Genetic ---\n")
print(ros_genetic_simple$quality)
cat("Rules:", nrow(ros_genetic_simple$main), "\n")
```
